name: Demon's Draught
author: PogoFox
bootlegger: Each day, the group may agree on a player (different from yesterday) to be the Health Inspector.

Each day, the Health Inspector of the day may visit the Storyteller to find out how many players are currently drunk, poisoned, or affected by a Vortox.  If the Health Inspector is drunk, poisoned, or affected by a Vortox, they will receive a false number at least 2 away from the truth.
